title: Gulf Aluminium Supply Shock
summary:
Main
Iranian strikes on EGA and Alba, combined with the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, represent the most severe supply disruption since 2022. This week, Allied QuantumSea Research examines an alternative angle on the escalation in Hormuz, focusing on its implications for the aluminium industry. Key Figures
• LME 3M prices are around $3,492/t, with an increase of roughly 6% at the start of the week, pointing to firm short-term momentum.
